TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Kabalelradhane . u kasalumaluma' nu Kabalelradhane sa, 130 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 405 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 399 ku tademaw, pakalatu 99%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 6 ku tademaw, pakalatu 1%. u kasabinacadan, Rukai 93%, Paiwan 4%, Amis 1%.
S.PHON: i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu kabar~ɾər~ɾradħanə . u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu kabar~ɾər~ɾradħanə sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, *ukai **%, paiwan *%, amis *%.
S.FORM: i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Kabalelradhane . u kasalumaluma' nu Kabalelradhane sa, 130 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 405 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 399 ku tademaw, pakalatu 99%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 6 ku tademaw, pakalatu 1%. u kasabinacadan, Rukai 93%, Paiwan 4%, Amis 1%.
S.PHON: i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu kabar~ɾər~ɾradħanə . u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu kabar~ɾər~ɾradħanə sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, *ukai **%, paiwan *%, amis *%.
